playlists.title: HTML & CSS Tutorial for Beginners
playlists.description: The ultimate modern HTML & CSS course. Covers layout, CSS Grid, Flexbox, and real projects from scratch.

playlists.title: JavaScript Tutorial for Beginners
playlists.description: Learn Javascript core basics: variables, control flow, functions, objects, and array operations.

playlists.title: ReactJS Course for Beginners
playlists.description: Learn React from basic components to full-stack integration, Hooks, context, and routing.

playlists.title: Node.js & Express.js Tutorial
playlists.description: Comprehensive tutorial on building backend APIs, servers, routing, middleware, and database connections.

playlists.title: Python for Data Science Course
playlists.description: Learn Python basics, then jump into data manipulation libraries: NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib.

playlists.title: Statistics & Probability for Data Science
playlists.description: Comprehensive lessons covering descriptive statistics, distributions, testing, and regressions.

playlists.title: Machine Learning for Beginners
playlists.description: Master machine learning concepts from linear regression to decision trees and neural nets visually.

playlists.title: Deep Learning / Neural Networks Course
playlists.description: Stunning visual explanations of neural networks, backpropagation, and calculus behind deep learning.

playlists.title: Data Structures & Algorithms Course
playlists.description: Clear step-by-step mathematical explanations of data structures and algorithms.

playlists.title: Java Tutorial for Beginners
playlists.description: Complete beginner course in Java programming, OOP principles, and clean architectural design.

playlists.title: SQL Tutorial for Beginners
playlists.description: Learn relational database management systems, writing queries, joins, and aggregates in SQL.

playlists.title: System Design Primer
playlists.description: Learn microservices, caching, load balancers, database scaling, and designing real-world architectures.

playlists.title: Neural Networks: Zero to Hero
playlists.description: Build neural networks from scratch, understanding backpropagation, GPT, and language models.

playlists.title: PyTorch for Deep Learning Course
playlists.description: Hands-on PyTorch course covering computer vision, NLP, and model deployment.

playlists.title: LangChain & LLM App Development
playlists.description: Build applications using Large Language Models, LangChain, vector stores, and prompt engineering.

playlists.title: Linear Algebra for Machine Learning
playlists.description: A comprehensive primer on matrix operations, eigenvectors, and maths behind modern ML algorithms.

playlists.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
playlists.description: Prepare for AWS certification covering EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, VPC, and serverless compute.

playlists.title: Docker & Kubernetes Full Course
playlists.description: Learn containerization, configuration, deployment, orchestration, and scaling with Kubernetes.

playlists.title: Linux Command Line for Beginners
playlists.description: Master the command line, scripting, file systems, permissions, and package management in Linux.

playlists.title: Terraform / Infrastructure as Code
playlists.description: Learn how to provision AWS resources declaratively using HashiCorp Configuration Language (HCL).

playlists.title: Computer Networking Full Course
playlists.description: Prepare for CompTIA Network+; learn IP addressing, subnets, routers, switches, and TCP/IP stack.

playlists.title: Ethical Hacking Course for Beginners
playlists.description: Learn penetration testing methodologies, Linux commands, port scanning, and exploit techniques.

playlists.title: CompTIA Security+ Exam Prep
playlists.description: Complete exam study playlist covering threats, network security, risk management, and cryptography.

playlists.title: Web Application Penetration Testing
playlists.description: Focus on OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, API security, and Bug Bounty hunting techniques.
